description: Read and analyze existing Editor view components
steps: Read EditorView.tsx to understand component structure and data flow
Read ExplorerPane.tsx to understand file tree rendering
Read CodeEditor.tsx to understand code display logic
Read ContextPanel.tsx to understand panel collapse behavior
Review design reference files (screen.png, code.html, DESIGN.md)

description: Verify file service and hooks infrastructure
steps: Check services/fileService.ts implementation
Check hooks/useFileContent.ts if it exists
Verify vite-plugin-files.ts configuration
Confirm mock data structure in data/ directory

description: Bug 1: Fix native scrollbars in ExplorerPane and CodeEditor
steps: Add thin-scrollbar class to ExplorerPane scrollable container (line 57)
Add thin-scrollbar class to CodeEditor scrollable container (line 37)
Audit all other scrollable containers in editor feature
Verify ContextPanel still uses no-scrollbar correctly
Test scrolling behavior in all areas

description: Bug 2: Fix CodeEditor showing 'No file selected' when tab is open
steps: Trace data flow from tab creation (EditorView.tsx line 81-91)
Check mockEditorFiles structure vs file tree node names
Implement useFileContent hook integration in EditorView
Update activeFile lookup to use file service instead of static mock
Ensure file content loads when tab becomes active
Test tab switching shows correct content

description: Bug 3: Add selected file highlighting and scroll-into-view in Explorer
steps: Add selectedFileId prop to ExplorerPane component
Pass selectedFileId from EditorView to ExplorerPane to FileTree
Add selectedFileId prop to FileTreeNode component
Apply bg-primary/10 text-on-surface styling when node is selected
Add useEffect with scrollIntoView in FileTreeNode when selected
Prevent duplicate tab creation when clicking already-open file
Test highlight moves with active tab changes

description: Bug 4: Add reopen button for collapsed ContextPanel
steps: Create floating toggle button component outside ContextPanel
Position button at fixed right edge with proper z-index
Use dock_to_left or chevron_left Material Symbol icon
Apply design system styles: bg-surface-container with hover state
Add smooth fade-in transition when panel collapses
Add smooth fade-out transition when panel opens
Add aria-label for accessibility
Test button appears/disappears correctly on panel state change

description: Update tests for Bug 1: Scrollbar classes
steps: Update ExplorerPane.test.tsx to verify thin-scrollbar class presence
Update CodeEditor.test.tsx to verify thin-scrollbar class presence
Add test for ContextPanel no-scrollbar class
Run specific test files to verify changes

description: Update tests for Bug 2: File content display
steps: Update EditorView.test.tsx to test file content loading
Update or extend FileContentLoading.integration.test.tsx
Add test case for 'No file selected' only shown when no tabs open
Add test case for tab switching shows correct content
Mock useFileContent hook appropriately

description: Update tests for Bug 3: File selection highlighting
steps: Update FileTreeNode.test.tsx to test selected state styling
Mock scrollIntoView and verify it's called when node becomes selected
Update EditorView.integration.test.tsx to test highlight follows active tab
Add test for preventing duplicate tab creation
Verify bg-primary/10 class applied when selected

description: Update tests for Bug 4: ContextPanel reopen button
steps: Update ContextPanel.test.tsx to test reopen button visibility
Add test for button click handler reopens panel
Update PanelCollapse.integration.test.tsx for button behavior
Verify aria-label presence for accessibility
Test button transitions (fade in/out)
Run npm run lint and fix any errors
Run npm run type-check and fix any TypeScript errors
Run npm run format:check and fix formatting if needed
Verify zero errors in all checks

description: Run all tests and verify coverage
steps: Run npm run test and ensure all tests pass
Check test coverage is >= 80%
Fix any failing tests
Document any coverage gaps
Run npm run build
Verify build completes without errors
Check dist/ output is generated correctly
Start dev server and open Editor view
Verify scrollbars match design system (thin, dark)
Verify file content displays when tab is open
Verify selected file is highlighted in explorer with bg-primary/10
Verify selected file scrolls into view when off-screen
Verify ContextPanel reopen button appears when collapsed
Compare against docs/design/files_and_editor/screen.png
Document any visual discrepancies
